expected_input.notes: SAM-assisted tracking requires a trusted ball seed point. It is not a standalone tennis ball tracker.

notes: SAM/SAM2 is experimental for tennis ball tracking.
It may require point prompts or an initial ball seed.
It is not the primary recommended path; TrackNet remains preferred for tennis ball tracking.
Do not fall back to YOLO/HSV in the SAM-assisted replay pipeline.
Do not fake ball positions when dependencies, weights, or seeds are missing.
